user.title: Garage Door Setup
user.description: Configure your RF garage door controlled via a Tuya IR/RF bridge.

data_description.open_entity: The entity that triggers the garage door to open.
data_description.close_entity: The entity that triggers the garage door to close.
data_description.stop_entity: Optional entity to stop the door. If not set, the opposite direction command is used.
data_description.duration: How long the door takes to fully open or close (in seconds).

error.same_entity: Open and close entities must be different.

init.title: Garage Door Settings
init.description: Modify your garage door configuration or force the current state if it got out of sync.

data_description.force_state: Override the current state if it got out of sync with the physical door. The value resets after being applied.

error.same_entity: Open and close entities must be different.
